inputs.label: Sample Size (n)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of paired observations with non-zero differences.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of paired observations with non-zero differences.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfırdan farklı farklara sahip toplam eşleştirilmiş gözlem sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der gepaarten Beobachtungen mit Differenzen ungleich Null.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'observations appariées avec des différences non nulles.

inputs.label: Number of Positive Signs
inputs.businessContext: Count of observations where the difference is positive.

businessContext_i18n.en: Count of observations where the difference is positive.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Beobachtungen, bei denen die Differenz positiv ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'observations où la différence est positive.

inputs.label: Hypothesized Probability
inputs.businessContext: Under null hypothesis, probability of a positive sign (typically 0.5 for median test).

businessContext_i18n.en: Under null hypothesis, probability of a positive sign (typically 0.5 for median test).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıfır hipotezi altında, pozitif işaret olasılığı (medyan testi için tipik olarak 0,5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Unter der Nullhypothese Wahrscheinlichkeit eines positiven Vorzeichens (typischerweise 0,5 für Mediantest).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sous l'hypothèse nulle, probabilité d'un signe positif (généralement 0,5 pour le test de médiane).

businessContext_i18n.de: Schwellenwert für die Wahrscheinlichkeit eines Fehlers 1. Art.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Seuil de probabilité d'erreur de type I.

inputs.label: Alternative Hypothesis
inputs.businessContext: Specifies the direction of the test: 1 for two-tailed, 2 for upper-tailed, 3 for lower-tailed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Specifies the direction of the test: 1 for two-tailed, 2 for upper-tailed, 3 for lower-tailed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Testin yönünü belirtir: 1 çift kuyruklu, 2 üst kuyruklu, 3 alt kuyruklu.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gibt die Richtung des Tests an: 1 für zweiseitig, 2 für einseitig oben, 3 für einseitig unten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Spécifie la direction du test : 1 pour bilatéral, 2 pour unilatéral supérieur, 3 pour unilatéral inférieur.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
